title: scutellaria chimenensis
intro: Scutellaria chimenensis, also known as Huang-qin or Chinese skullcap, is a perennial plant native to Asia, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria chimenensis include reducing fever, alleviating cough and sore throat, and protecting against liver and kidney damage. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of conditions, including digestive issues and anxiety disorders.
